inputs.label: Number of subintervals (n)
inputs.businessContext: Must be even for Simpson's rule

inputs.label: Function type
inputs.businessContext: 1: sin(x), 2: cos(x), 3: x^2, 4: sqrt(x), 5: exp(x), 6: log(x)

formulas.f: function(x) { if (functionType === 1) return Math.sin(x); if (functionType === 2) return Math.cos(x); if (functionType === 3) return x * x; if (functionType === 4) return Math.sqrt(x); if (functionType === 5) return Math.exp(x); if (functionType === 6) return Math.log(x); return 0; }

breakdown: f(a) = sin(a) or cos(a) or a^2 or sqrt(a) or exp(a) or log(a)
f(b) = sin(b) or cos(b) or b^2 or sqrt(b) or exp(b) or log(b)
